<!-- indicator: tbl-medicaid-1dental-visit-percent (fallback) -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: tbl-medicaid-1dental-visit-percent
#| tbl-cap: 'Table showing Medicaid 1 dental visit percent.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_table_object
render_table_object(object_id="tbl-medicaid-1dental-visit-percent", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH)
```
